     the Fermi energy is     0.4487 ev

!    total energy              =   -6197.44448229 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000003 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.04843928 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -6197.39604301 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -116390.99520641 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   58778.05843345 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2130.86499504 Ry
     ewald contribution        =   53548.03533705 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.62961205 Ry
